title: Steam Golem deals 3x Atk damage to AL 12 creatures

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. This creature inflicts 3x Atk damage to any creature with an AL of 12. This includes equip cards.

plan.title: Steam Golem deals 3x Atk damage to AL 12 creatures

notes: Place Steam Golem on player_1 field as primary.
